title: selaginella raiateensis
intro: Selaginella raiateensis, also known as the Raiatea spikemoss, is a species of small, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginella genus, characterized by its spiky, green foliage and ability to thrive in moist environments. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella raiateensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for maintaining overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be consumed or applied topically to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
